name: claude-sfdx-iq
description: Complete Salesforce DX plugin for Claude Code — agents, skills, hooks, commands, and rules for Apex, LWC, SOQL, Flows, and SFDX CI/CD

hooks.description: Apex lint — checks bulkification, governor limits, security after editing .cls files
Trigger lint — validates one-trigger-per-object pattern and handler delegation after editing .trigger files
LWC lint — checks component structure, wire usage, and security after editing LWC JS files
Flow check — validates flow best practices and DML/query budgeting after editing flow metadata
SOQL check — detects SOQL in loops, missing bind variables, and selectivity issues after editing .cls files
Pre-commit check — runs security and quality gate scan before every git commit
